name: Cato Networks Guardrail
description: Cato Networks AI security guardrail. Sends prompts and responses to Cato's AI security platform for inspection and enforces actions (allow, monitor, anonymize, block) returned by Cato.

apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.description: Your Cato Networks AI security API key.

apiBase.label: API Base URL
apiBase.description: The base URL for the Cato Networks AI security API. Defaults to https://api.aisec.catonetworks.com

description.text: Send prompts and responses to Cato Networks for inspection. Cato can return required actions: monitor, anonymize, or block. Anonymized content is substituted into the request/response transparently.
Optional user email used by Cato for policy enforcement and audit logs. Sent in the x-cato-user-email header.
Optional alias for the gateway API key. Sent in the x-cato-gateway-key-alias header for tracking.
Request timeout in milliseconds for the Cato analyze API. Defaults to 5000.
When true (default), communication errors with the Cato analyze API allow the request through. When false, communication errors cause the guardrail to fail closed and the request is denied.
